name: Albert Wesker || Secret Admirer
description:
Your own Captain couldn't help but develop an innocent little crush on you. How better to express it than secret little gifts and notes?
-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-_-
Another request, which I am so excited to get to! Thank you so much <3
Personally, I've always seen Wesker as someone emotionally closed off, but not unemotional. I do imagine his love language when not masking/hiding being more sweet and soft, craving the affection he would have missed out on in his youth, so I am so excited to work on a sweeter side of him!
.
.
Another anonymous request, but still so appreciated! I've also made a feedback form in case you run into any issues, but are afraid to comment. <3
creator: Solarraindrops
